findings.evidence: PR lines 48-49 define `orbitQuotientToBase` as `Quotient.lift p ...`, and line 132 proves the lemma by exactly `Quotient.lift_surjective p _ hp`; Mathlib provides `Quotient.lift_surjective` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Quot.lean:312-315`.
findings.fix: Drop this wrapper and use `Quotient.lift_surjective p _ hreg.1` directly in `orbitQuotientEquivBase`, or keep it private if only needed locally.
findings.issue: `orbitQuotientToBase_surjective` is a public specialization of the generic surjectivity theorem for `Quotient.lift`.

summary: The main quotient-base equivalence is new domain API, but part of the exposed quotient API duplicates generic quotient results instead of reusing them directly.
